-> diskFlash2
diskFlash2: Starting. g_flashType=0x222
clearCheckSumFlash: 0x02800000  1835008  0
erasing logical sector  0 (bankAddr=0x02800000, bankSector= 7)
sectorEraseNew: bank=0x2800000.  Old sector=7.  First New Sector=17 Last New Sector=18
programming data...
erasing logical sector  6 (bankAddr=0x02800000, bankSector=13)
sectorEraseNew: bank=0x2800000.  Old sector=13.  First New Sector=29 Last New Sector=30
programming data...
erasing logical sector  7 (bankAddr=0x02800000, bankSector=14)
sectorEraseNew: bank=0x2800000.  Old sector=14.  First New Sector=31 Last New Sector=32
programming data...
erasing logical sector  8 (bankAddr=0x02c00000, bankSector= 0)
sectorEraseNew: bank=0x2c00000.  Old sector=0.  First New Sector=0 Last New Sector=4
programming data...
erasing logical sector  9 (bankAddr=0x02c00000, bankSector= 1)
sectorEraseNew: bank=0x2c00000.  Old sector=1.  First New Sector=5 Last New Sector=6
programming data...
erasing logical sector 10 (bankAddr=0x02c00000, bankSector= 2)
sectorEraseNew: bank=0x2c00000.  Old sector=2.  First New Sector=7 Last New Sector=8
programming data...
erasing logical sector 11 (bankAddr=0x02c00000, bankSector= 3)
sectorEraseNew: bank=0x2c00000.  Old sector=3.  First New Sector=9 Last New Sector=10
programming data...
erasing logical sector 12 (bankAddr=0x02c00000, bankSector= 4)
sectorEraseNew: bank=0x2c00000.  Old sector=4.  First New Sector=11 Last New Sector=12
programming data...
erasing logical sector 13 (bankAddr=0x02c00000, bankSector= 5)
sectorEraseNew: bank=0x2c00000.  Old sector=5.  First New Sector=13 Last New Sector=14
programming data...
erasing logical sector 14 (bankAddr=0x02c00000, bankSector= 6)
sectorEraseNew: bank=0x2c00000.  Old sector=6.  First New Sector=15 Last New Sector=16
programming data...
